creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #0)
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #0)

Hi,

It seems the issue isn't specific to devel/forge but happens with all ports depending on Emacs.

For example, I made clean install of 14.0-RELEASE amd64 system, login as root, and executed `pkg install lang/php-mode.el`. Then it tried to install following 3 packages.

* php-mode.el (lang/php-mode.el@full)
* php-mode.el-emacs_canna (lang/php-mode.el@canna)
* php-mode.el-emacs_nox (lang/php-mode.el@nox)

So there seems to be something wrong with handling of flavor about Emacs.

BTW you can work around the issue by explicitly specifying flavor such as `pkg install devel/forge@full`.
